category_sources: source_facts.description says it reads and randomizes lines from file or stdin; official homepage describes rl as a command-line tool for randomizing input lines.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title uses Randomize Lines; source_facts.name is randomize-lines.
docs_sources: Official homepage is the best documentation surface and includes description, installation instructions, warnings, and repository links.
repo_sources: Official homepage states the randomize lines development repository is available via read-only Subversion at arthurdejong.org/svn/rl.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage identify command-line line randomization from files or standard input on Unix-like systems.
